Flow.description: Updated the email templates (1 May, ET and NC)
Flow.label: 3B Request References

fields.name: DisplayText
fields.fieldText: Are you happy to request references from the referee?

fields.name: ReferenceType
fields.fieldText: Reference Type on the Reference record is empty.

fields.name: screeninfo
fields.fieldText: This reference record has not been approved by the consultant yet. You cannot request reference from the referee at this point.

textTemplates.name: body1
textTemplates.text:
{!Get_References.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c} {!Get_References.b3o__Last_Name_Referee__c},

 

 

An applicant {!FullNameApplicant} has applied for one of our roles here at Alliance Nursing and provided your details as a reference. 

 

We'd appreciate if you could please fill out the form below, it will only take 2 minutes of your time.

 

Reference Form

 

Best regards, 

Alliance Nursing

textTemplates.description: Request Reference - General Please provide References
textTemplates.name: RequestReferenceGeneral
textTemplates.text:
{!Get_References.b3o__First_Name_Referee__c} {!Get_References.b3o__Last_Name_Referee__c},

 

 

An applicant {!Get_References.b3o__Contact__r.Name} has applied for one of our roles here at Alliance Nursing and provided your details as a reference. 

 

We'd appreciate if you could please fill out the form below, it will only take 2 minutes of your time.

 

Reference Form

 

Best regards, 

Alliance Nursing

{!Get_References.b3o__Contact__c}
